trigger_reason: The agent prioritizes high-level summarization and MITRE mapping over the forensic rigor required for an audit trail, leading to 'hallucination-adjacent' reporting where conclusions lack the necessary granular evidence pointers.
improvements: Implementation of 'Contextual Completeness' verification step: Before report generation, a secondary agent pass must verify that all 'not found' findings include the specific source/query used to prove the negative.
Strict ISO 8601 Timestamp enforcement: Mandate the inclusion of full date and time objects in all timeline narratives to eliminate ambiguity.

checklist.note: Reconstruct full chronological sequence using full ISO 8601 timestamps (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) for all events.
Mandatory inclusion of raw log signatures, file paths, and registry keys (e.g., Run keys, Temp directories) for all detected artifacts.
When asserting 'not found' for lateral movement/persistence, must explicitly document the specific telemetry sources (e.g., EID 4624) queried.
Link each MITRE ATT&CK technique to a specific evidentiary artifact pointer found in the investigation memory.
Quantify data volume and provide explicit verification of destination IP/ASN reputation and geolocation.
